title: salix × whiteana
intro: Salix × whiteana, also known as the hybrid willow, is a cross between the white willow (Salix alba) and the weeping willow (Salix babylonica). This plant has been utilized for its medicinal properties, particularly its bark, which contains salicin, a compound that has anti-inflammatory and pain-relieving effects. The health benefits of Salix × whiteana include reducing fever, alleviating headaches and arthritis, and soothing skin irritations due to its anti-inflammatory properties. Salix × whiteana can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or salve, with the bark being the primary source of its medicinal compounds.
